gitCommit.subject: fix(deploy): remove dead var 'hasSales' that broke lint:baseline (Vercel build) (#742)
gitCommit.body:
fix(deploy): remove dead var 'hasSales' that broke lint:baseline (Vercel build) (#742)

O build de producao (typecheck && lint:baseline && vite build) falhava no passo lint:baseline: ProductSales90dButton.tsx tinha 'const hasSales' declarado e nunca usado (residuo do refactor 'exibir sempre o botao' + escopo de variante), disparando @typescript-eslint/no-unused-vars (baseline=0 -> atual=1). Remove a linha morta. Validacao: eslint no arquivo = 0 problemas; vite build = OK (5765 modulos); guards/validate-config = OK; noUnusedLocals=false (nao era erro de tsc).
